# kCVImageBufferCleanApertureHorizontalOffsetKey

**Global Variable**

A key to the clean aperture horizontal offset value from the center of the image buffer.

## Declaration

```swift
let kCVImageBufferCleanApertureHorizontalOffsetKey: CFString
```

## Discussion

The horizontal offset value is of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFNumber].

## Constants

- **kCVImageBufferCleanApertureWidthKey**: A key to the clean aperture width of the image buffer.
- **kCVImageBufferCleanApertureHeightKey**: A key to the clean aperture height of the image buffer.
- **kCVImageBufferCleanApertureVerticalOffsetKey**: A key to the clean aperture vertical offset value from the center of the image buffer.
